data.name: tags
data.value: rag, semantic-search, context-retrieval, hybrid-retrieval, knowledge-graph, llm-orchestration, embeddings, prompt-engineering, vector-database, ai-integration, data-modeling, content-pipeline

data.name: summary
data.value: End-to-end architectural design of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for a portfolio chatbot, including ingestion pipeline, Markdown parsing, metadata extraction, chunking strategy, embedding generation, FAISS-based vector indexing, hybrid retrieval scoring, MMR diversity selection, cross-encoder reranking, document-aware aggregation, knowledge graph expansion, and LLM-based response generation within a low-infrastructure, static-site-compatible deployment model.
